positive: A stylized, whimsical composition featuring interconnected elements of deep space nebula art and bioluminescent forest flora. Central subject: A gracefully curved silhouette of a stylized crescent moon intertwined with delicate, ethereal, glowing vines and miniature constellation groupings. The background should transition from deep indigo and sapphire blue at the edges to vibrant magenta and cyan near the center, creating a dramatic, cosmic gradient. Incorporate patterns resembling sacred geometry and subtle stardust trails. Style: High-contrast digital illustration, inspired by Art Nouveau and celestial cartography, clean lines, minimalist yet richly detailed. Composition: Centered, balanced, ideal for repeating tile or central apparel placement. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting, emphasizing glowing edges and stark silhouettes. Print-friendly: Crisp vector quality, limited palette depth.
